opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just stopped seeing the point in going out or doing anything; no one sees me anyway.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A phone triage line called it in — I haven't really gotten out of bed or eaten much for a couple of days and someone was worried about me.

symptom_narrative.onset: creeping over about two months, but it got a lot worse in the last few days
symptom_narrative.duration: the worst couple of days — I've barely been out of bed for about 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: I just feel flat and worn out, like there's no point. I don't have the energy or the will to do anything.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I can barely get myself up out of the chair without pushing off with my arms
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's a whole-body thing — weak and heavy all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now; worse the last two or three days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: being on my own with no one checking in
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I haven't been eating or drinking much, I feel cold, and I get muddled about what day it is
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt low and lonely for a while but I've never gone downhill this fast
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I was managing on my own before; now I'm stuck in bed and can't really look after myself

past_medical_history.how_managed: tablets, but I've missed them for a few days

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone. Feels invisible and unseen in the community and has withdrawn from almost all contact. Mail has piled up at the door and there is old food in the fridge. Reluctant to seek help because of a fear of being brushed off or treated as a nuisance because of age.

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, single-word or very brief replies; low engagement; needs gentle prompting

reluctance_topics: fear of being dismissed because of age

access_barriers.transport: no easy transport; lives alone with no one to drive her
access_barriers.other: socially isolated, no reliable person checking in

objective_data_offered.value: I think I'm about 58 kilos now, I've lost weight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, not a measured or recent scale reading

objective_data_offered.value: I've hardly had anything to eat or drink for about two days
I feel really cold; I don't have a thermometer to check
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective sensation only; no device reading available
